candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Using the oxygen affinity curve in the figure, determine the amount of oxygen that would be delivered to cells at $\text{PO}_2 = 20$ mmHg if the $\text{PO}_2$ of the lungs were $60$ mmHg. Assume maximum $\text{HbO}_2$ to be the level of oxygen delivery if all available oxygen in the RBC's was transferred to cells.
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: 65% of the maximum $\text{HbO}_2$ would be delivered.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 根据所给氧亲和力曲线,如果肺部的$\text{PO}_2$为$60\,\mathrm{mmHg}$,请确定在$\text{PO}_2=20\,\mathrm{mmHg}$时将输送到细胞的氧气量。假设红细胞中所有可利用的氧气都转移到细胞中,则最大$\text{HbO}_2$浓度即为氧气递送水平。
